mnemonics.title: Plagiarism Types
mnemonics.content: PASTE: Paraphrasing, Accidental, Self, Total, Excerpt

acronyms.expansion: Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses

visualTips.visualization: Imagine spiderwebs connecting papers - thicker strands mean stronger citation relationships
Picture a timeline with emerging terms growing larger as they gain popularity

analogies.analogy: Like being a detective connecting clues (papers) to solve a mystery (research gap)
Acts as a personal librarian organizing and retrieving your research materials
